title: Battle of Lok (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Lok''' can refer to:

*the [[Battle of Lok (32 BBY)]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]
*the [[Battle of Lok (22 BBY)]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]
*the [[Battle of Nym's Factory Compound]] during the [[Droid Revolution]]

{{Disambig}}
